title: taraxacum calcareum
intro: Taraxacum calcareum, also known as the limestone dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged, toothed leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Taraxacum calcareum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various gastrointestinal disorders and infections. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum calcareum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
